reviews.review_msg: This class was total bs. Sure Rina knew her stuff, but was not that great at teaching it. This class was very useless. Do not take it if you do not have to. She was definitely a tough grader as well

This is a very odd class. There was no syllabus given, so you never knew what you were walking into week by week. Rina is an interesting professor, but the class and concepts were easy. YOU NEED TO SHOW UP to pass the course. The lectures were quite boring, but you do need to pay attention because the midterm is all based on in-class content.

The course concepts were really easy, and even more so if you have taken Math190 previously. However, Rina was not the best at teaching these concepts, and you basically have to teach them to yourself, either using outside sources or the textbook. Lectures were unnecessarily long for the course concepts. Also made distasteful comments and examples.

Honestly the concepts were easy, Rina was not a good teacher, she did examples on the board without explaining and you were just expected to follow along. Rina also made many out of pocket comments that should never be said in a educational setting, Do yourself a favour and don't take this class with her.

EDUC 475 intersession, elementary math for PDP. Glad she's been consistent, she is still really funny and tells great stories. No exams thankfully, but 2 individual assignments and 6 group projects. Pretty hard marker. She's very bold, never afraid to tell u from right or wrong. Won't sugar coat anything. her 1st time teaching elem math

Are you weak at math? Don't take her class or get a tutor. I'm weak in math and i failed the course. She's a nice lady but the material is difficult. The first mid-term was not hard but the second and final were painful!
Rina is super nice and friendly! The class is okay, not hard and not easy. She makes the class fun and she's funny without even trying. If you need help, go to workshop or ask her. She's great!
Rina is amazing.  She made the subject come to life.  Without her help I would not be pursuing mathematics now

she's awesome! best class, best teacher
 she's really funny and shes super helpful. do the homework and the exams will be easy.
 dont sit in the back rows if she says not to and dont fall asleep in class...she'll make fun of you (but in a nice way)
Yah Rina!  She's the best.

not an easy class if you're not great with math. LOTS of work!! her exam material stresses stuff learned in lecture a lot, go to lecture and take notes! seems to use a similar test bank year to year....
Not an easy class. Do the work. Go to the Workshop. You'll do alright.  Rina has an incredible passion for math, never a boring class.

Rina is funny and tells good stories, she can be harsh at times, but she is a good teacher. The material is hard. This isn't an easy class, I would recommend that you know the basics to math in adavance since you are expected to know it and she doesn't go over it. I worked hard and I ended up w/ B-. Go over the practice ?'s it helps.

bah! a final exam worth 50% of your grade, and she puts only 10 questions on it. each question is 5% of your final mark! Yikes! and they're not easy either. and one of the questions on it, she covered that topic for the first time that class. Yea she's energetic and knows her stuff, but that's not cool at all.
this lady has too much energy. She knows what she is doing!

this class is a waste. the textbook is confusing. she's passionate about teaching and very energetic, but i dont like her style of teaching. i dont recommend this class unless you're good at thinking "outside the box", if you are, you'll do well

If there was not only 1 month left, I would have dropped this class. Not really Rina's fault,she's just teaching a horrible class. Homework is not connected to what is learned in class. Material is boring, pointless and frustrating. Only good thing is the homework is done in groups. Can't wait until class is over!
started off where she was funny and charming, now the act gets old. afraid to ask questions now cause she makes some sort of joke out of it or makes you feel dumb

Interesting previous comments.  Rina is a great person, and she obviously loves what she does.  I found her to be quite helpful as a guest lecturer in Designs Elementary Math, and her greatest contribution was to help us relax and not take ourselves so seriously in that class.  I'd take her for a regular course anytime.

she suck at teaching..her lectures are waste and her marking scheme is stupid.. The materials in the class is very easy but it's not really helpful in real life. I've never had this kind of math teacher before.. very different from others...

Rina's teaching a REALLY hard course, her teaching style is abupted and aggressive at times; but it keeps you awake. I've taken this course before with another teacher at Douglas. Believe me, Rina is better. It's the material. Strap yourself in for a rough ride with whom ever you take it with.

She is a teacher's teacher!!!  She is fantastic with the ability to teach material very clearly and does so with enough fear/intimidation to keep you on your toes and yet you feel safe at the same time.  I will try to emulate this style when I start teaching. Thanks Rina.

Course itself was way too easy, yet not at all relevent to elementary school mathmatics, so I'm not sure why it's a prerequisite for the pdp program. Regardless, Rina Zazkis delivered the syllabus in a satisfactory manner. No complaints about the prof.

She is the rudest, most ignorant teacher I have ever known.  Unfortunately, she teaches Math For Teachers, which means that if you want to get into the PDP you'll probably have to encounter her at some point.  The class was a nightmare.
